App: Dimpact e2e test
Test Environment: Test

Feature:Login 5

Scenario:
Bob wants to login to ZAC
3

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 1s 741ms

When "Bob" logs in 755ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Dashboard" 1s 363ms

Scenario:
Bob wants to log out of the application after being logged in
4

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 1s 492ms

When "Bob" clicks on element with accessibility label: "Gebruikers profiel" 434ms

When "Bob" clicks on element with text: "Uitloggen" 574ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Sign in to your account" 20ms

Scenario:
Bob logs back in
4

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 1s 643ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Sign in to your account" 25ms

When "Bob" logs in 549ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Dashboard" 2s 806ms

Scenario:
Bob wants to log out of the application after being logged in
4

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 1s 507ms

When "Bob" clicks on element with accessibility label: "Gebruikers profiel" 410ms

When "Bob" clicks on element with text: "Uitloggen" 661ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Sign in to your account" 20ms

Scenario:
Bob logs back in
4

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 1s 459ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Sign in to your account" 27ms

When "Bob" logs in 532ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Dashboard" 1s 345ms
